description: Dashboard Widgetization Engine: inline widget config editing, drag-to-reorder grid layout, context pinning with scope broadcast, Projects widget with user/project collapsible split, and full widget self-registration system

userStories.title: Widget config schema: add editable, pinnable, scopeable flags to WidgetRegistry
userStories.description: Extend the WidgetRegistry widget definition schema to include: editable (bool, default true), pinnable (bool), supported_scopes (["global","project","formation","agent"]), default_config (map of defaults matching config_schema keys), and display_order (integer). Update @builtin_widgets to include these fields. Add WidgetRegistry.update_widget_config/2 and WidgetRegistry.pin_widget/2 public API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: WidgetRegistry schema includes editable, pinnable, supported_scopes, default_config, display_order
All @builtin_widgets include the new fields with sensible defaults
WidgetRegistry.update_widget_config/2 persists config override to ETS

userStories.title: LayoutStore: add widget_config overrides and pinned_widget persistence
userStories.description: Extend LayoutStore to persist per-session widget config overrides and track which widget is currently pinned as scope source. Add: save_widget_config(session_id, widget_id, config_map), get_widget_config(session_id, widget_id), set_pinned_widget(session_id, widget_id | nil), get_pinned_widget(session_id). Broadcasts :widget_config_updated and :pinned_widget_changed on ApmV5.PubSub topic "dashboard:session:{session_id}".
acceptanceCriteria: get_pinned_widget returns nil when no widget pinned

userStories.title: WidgetConfigStore GenServer: durable in-memory widget config with ETS
userStories.description: Create ApmV5.WidgetConfigStore GenServer backed by ETS table :widget_config_store. Stores per-session widget config overrides and pinned widget state. API: put_config(session_id, widget_id, config), get_config(session_id, widget_id), get_all_configs(session_id), set_pinned(session_id, widget_id), get_pinned(session_id), clear_session(session_id). Add to supervision tree under ApmV5.Application. Broadcasts changes via PubSub.
acceptanceCriteria: clear_session removes all session keys from ETS

userStories.title: DashboardScopeEngine: PubSub context pin and scope broadcast GenServer
userStories.description: Create ApmV5.DashboardScopeEngine GenServer. Manages per-session pinned scope source. When a widget is pinned and emits a scope selection event, broadcasts scope context to "dashboard:scope:{session_id}" PubSub topic so all non-user-level widgets can filter their data. API: pin_scope_source(session_id, widget_id), unpin(session_id), broadcast_scope(session_id, scope_type, scope_value), get_active_scope(session_id). Scope types: :global, :project, :formation, :agent.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardScopeEngine GenServer starts under supervision tree
pin_scope_source stores pinned widget in ETS
broadcast_scope emits {:scope_changed, scope_type, scope_value} on PubSub
unpin resets to :global scope and broadcasts

userStories.title: DashboardLive: subscribe to DashboardScopeEngine and wire scope broadcasts
userStories.description: Update DashboardLive to subscribe to dashboard:scope:{session_id} PubSub topic. Handle :scope_changed message by updating socket assigns: active_scope, scope_type, scope_value, pinned_widget_id. Pass scope assigns down to widget component renders. When pinned_widget changes, re-render the header scope breadcrumb. Ensure existing scope:set event handler is merged with new pin-driven scope system.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardLive subscribes to dashboard:scope:{session_id} on connect
handle_info(:scope_changed) updates active_scope, scope_type, scope_value assigns
pinned_widget_id assign reflects current DashboardScopeEngine state

userStories.title: WidgetEditPanelComponent LiveComponent: inline config editor for widget properties
userStories.description: Create ApmV5Web.Live.WidgetEditPanelComponent LiveComponent. Renders an inline slide-over panel (daisyUI drawer or absolute-positioned panel) when a widget edit button is clicked. Fields: title (text input), size (col_span select: 3/4/6/8/12), refresh_interval (number input, ms), and any config_schema fields rendered dynamically based on type (boolean=toggle, string=text, enum=select, integer=number). On save, calls phx-target to parent with widget_config_saved event. Close button dismisses. Uses phx-update=ignore on JS-managed animation wrapper.
acceptanceCriteria: WidgetEditPanelComponent renders with all config_schema fields
Boolean fields render as daisyUI toggle
Enum fields render as select with options parsed from "enum:opt1,opt2" schema
On save, sends widget_config_saved to parent LiveView

userStories.title: WidgetContainerComponent LiveComponent: wrapper with edit, pin, and title bar controls
userStories.description: Create ApmV5Web.Live.WidgetContainerComponent LiveComponent. Wraps any widget content with: title bar (widget name + custom title if set), control bar (edit pencil button, pin pushpin button, resize handle affordance). Edit button toggles WidgetEditPanelComponent. Pin button calls scope engine to pin/unpin this widget. Visual pin indicator (badge) when pinned. Accepts slot for widget body content. Passes widget_id, config, is_pinned, is_edit_mode assigns. Uses phx-update=ignore on resizable content wrapper per existing WidgetResize hook.
acceptanceCriteria: WidgetContainerComponent renders title bar with edit and pin buttons
Pin button sends widget_pin_toggle event to parent
is_pinned=true shows pin badge on title bar

userStories.title: DashboardGridComponent LiveComponent: drag-to-reorder widget layout
userStories.description: Create ApmV5Web.Live.DashboardGridComponent LiveComponent. Renders widgets in a CSS Grid (12-column) layout from LayoutStore placements. Each widget cell has a drag handle (daisyUI grab cursor). On drag-end, sends layout_reorder event to DashboardLive with new placement map. Uses Sortable.js (or pure JS drag events) via a new DashboardGrid JS hook. The hook uses phx-update=ignore on the grid container. Supports both preset layouts and user-customized layouts. Layout changes are saved to LayoutStore.save_user_layout/2.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardGridComponent renders placements as CSS grid cells
Each widget cell has data-widget-id attribute for JS hook
layout_reorder event received by DashboardLive with {order: [widget_ids]}

userStories.title: ContextPinDrillDownComponent: scope context panel with user/project split
userStories.description: Create ApmV5Web.Live.ContextPinDrillDownComponent LiveComponent. When a widget is pinned as scope source and a scope value is selected (e.g. project:ccem), renders a collapsible scope context panel below the pinned widget showing: project-level data in expanded section, user-level data in collapsed section (expand on click). Subscribes to dashboard:scope:{session_id} PubSub. When scope changes, updates all other widgets via scope_filter assign. Shows scope badge in header breadcrumb. User section is collapsed by default with a toggle button.
acceptanceCriteria: Project section expanded by default, user section collapsed
Scope badge shown in breadcrumb area
Subscribes to dashboard:scope PubSub and updates on change

userStories.title: ProjectsWidget LiveComponent: projects list with pin-to-scope support
userStories.description: Create ApmV5Web.Live.Widgets.ProjectsWidget LiveComponent. Displays active projects from ApmV5.ProjectStore as a list with project name, active session count, agent count, and status badge. Each row has a Select button — clicking broadcasts scope_selected event to DashboardScopeEngine with project scope. Widget declares pinnable: true and supported_scopes: [:project]. Subscribes to apm:config PubSub for live project updates. Register in WidgetRegistry with id: "projects", category: :monitoring, min_width: 3, min_height: 3.
acceptanceCriteria: Each row shows name, session count, agent count, status badge
Select button broadcasts scope_selected with project:name scope
Widget registered in WidgetRegistry with id="projects", pinnable=true
Live updates when apm:config PubSub fires

userStories.title: DashboardGrid JS hook: drag-reorder with Sortable.js integration
userStories.description: Create assets/js/hooks/dashboard_grid.js implementing the DashboardGrid LiveView hook. On mounted, initialize Sortable.js on the grid container element (import from assets/vendor or npm). On Sortable end event, collect new order of widget_id data attributes and pushEvent("layout_reorder", {order: [...]}) to LiveView. On updated, re-initialize Sortable if grid children changed. Use phx-update=ignore on the sortable container. Add DashboardGrid to app.js Hooks registry. Handle destroyed to cleanly destroy Sortable instance.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardGrid exported and imported in app.js Hooks
destroyed() calls sortable.destroy() to prevent memory leaks

userStories.title: DashboardLive: wire WidgetContainer, DashboardGrid, and edit/pin event handlers
userStories.description: Update DashboardLive to render all widgets through WidgetContainerComponent and DashboardGridComponent. Handle new events: widget_edit_open (set edit_panel_widget_id), widget_config_saved (persist to WidgetConfigStore, broadcast), widget_pin_toggle (call DashboardScopeEngine), layout_reorder (call LayoutStore.save_user_layout), layout_preset_select (load preset, update assigns). Pass scope_filter from active_scope assign down to each widget that declares supported_scopes. Ensure all widget state (configs, pinned, scope) survives reconnects via assigns.

userStories.title: API endpoints: GET /api/v2/widgets, PATCH /api/v2/widgets/:id/config, POST /api/v2/dashboard/layout
userStories.description: Add REST API endpoints to ApmV5Web.Router and controller: GET /api/v2/widgets returns all registered widget definitions from WidgetRegistry. GET /api/v2/widgets/:id returns single widget. PATCH /api/v2/widgets/:id/config accepts {session_id, config} and calls WidgetConfigStore. GET /api/v2/dashboard/layout?session_id=X returns current layout (preset + user overrides). POST /api/v2/dashboard/layout accepts {session_id, placements} to save custom layout. POST /api/v2/dashboard/pin accepts {session_id, widget_id} to pin scope source. Update OpenAPI spec at /api/v2/openapi.json.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v2/widgets returns 13+ widget definitions as JSON array

userStories.title: Integration tests: widget config, context pin, layout reorder, Projects widget scope
userStories.description: Write ExUnit integration tests covering: (1) WidgetConfigStore.put_config/get_config round-trip, (2) DashboardScopeEngine.pin_scope_source broadcasts to PubSub, (3) LayoutStore.save_user_layout persists and retrieves placements, (4) WidgetRegistry.register_widget adds plugin widget to ETS, (5) LiveView integration: mount DashboardLive, trigger widget_pin_toggle, verify scope_changed PubSub message, (6) API: GET /api/v2/widgets returns 13+ widgets including "projects". Target: all tests pass with mix test --only widgetization.
acceptanceCriteria: DashboardLive LiveView pin/scope integration test passes
GET /api/v2/widgets API test passes with projects widget included
